title: Student Profile & Course Portal (HTML Only)
learning_concept: HTML Tables (<table>, caption, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr, th, td)
learning_outcome: Gain a solid understanding of basic HTML structure
Be proficient in using common HTML tags for text, lists, links, images, tables, and forms
Understand how to build a multi-page website and link pages together
Develop foundational knowledge of semantic HTML
Appreciate the separation of concerns by working only with HTML

title: Dressing Up Your Websites with CSS
learning_concept: CSS Resetting and Base Styling (margin: 0, padding: 0, box-sizing: border-box)
Link Styling and Pseudo-classes (a:hover, a:visited, a:active)
Flexbox Layout (display: flex, flex-wrap, gap, flex-basis, flex-grow, flex-direction)
CSS Grid Layout (display: grid, grid-template-columns, repeat, auto-fit, minmax, gap, alignment, spanning)
Form Styling (inputs, textareas, select, buttons, input:focus, button:hover)
Table Styling (border-collapse, zebra striping, nth-child, row hovers)
CSS Transitions and Keyframe Animations (@keyframes, opacity)
Responsive Design & Media Queries (breakpoints, mobile-first/desktop adjustments)
learning_outcome: Learn CSS fundamentals and styling plain pages
Apply colors, fonts, spacing, and borders to HTML elements
Master layout techniques using Flexbox and Grid
Style forms for usability and tables for legibility
Make websites responsive using media queries for mobile, tablet, and desktop

title: Bringing Your Websites to Life with JavaScript
learning_concept: JavaScript Variables and Data Types (numbers, strings, booleans)
DOM Manipulation (document.getElementById, innerText/textContent, createElement, appendChild, classList)
Events and Event Handling (addEventListener, click, mouseover, mouseout, submit, event object)
Console debugging and developer tools (ReferenceError, TypeError, console.log, breakpoints)
learning_outcome: Confidently write basic JavaScript code with good structure
Understand and use fundamental JS concepts: variables, data types, operators, strings, loops, arrays, objects, and functions
Manipulate the DOM to make web pages interactive
Create reusable functions and handle user events
Perform basic debugging to find and fix issues in code

title: Building an AI-Powered Content Generator with Modern JavaScript & Gemini API
learning_outcome: Confidently use modern ES6+ JavaScript syntax for cleaner and more efficient code
Effectively manipulate and transform data using ES6 array methods
Understand and implement asynchronous JavaScript using Promises and the fetch() API to work with external services
Successfully integrate a third-party API (Gemini AI) into a frontend application
Grasp the fundamentals of the client-server request/response cycle
Build a functional application that leverages the power of AI

title: Your First Backend with Node.js, Express & Gemini AI!
learning_concept: Express Routing (GET and POST requests, app.get(), app.post())
npm package manager (npm init -y, npm install express)
Environment Variables (.env file and dotenv package)
Asynchronous programming with async/await on the backend
Making HTTP requests from Node.js server using fetch/axios
CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) and cors middleware
learning_outcome: Build a basic web server using Node.js and Express.js
Understand the client-server architecture and communication
Create API routes on the backend to send and receive data
Connect backend to external APIs like Gemini securely
Understand asynchronous operations on the backend
Securely manage sensitive information like API keys using environment variables

title: Your First Database with MongoDB & Mongoose!
learning_concept: Security of database connection strings via .env
learning_outcome: Understand the role of databases in web applications
Connect a Node.js/Express.js application to a MongoDB database using Mongoose
Define data structures (schemas) and create models for database collections
Perform fundamental CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations
Build data-driven applications where content is stored and retrieved from a database
Securely manage database connection strings and user-generated data persistently

title: Final Full-Stack Project with AI Integration
learning_concept: User Authentication and Authorization (JWT and bcrypt)
Project collaboration data models and member authorization
File Uploads & multipart form data processing using Multer
File storage and integration with services like Cloudinary
Basic contribution analytics tracking and aggregation
learning_outcome: Design, develop, and deploy a full-stack web application from scratch
Implement secure user authentication and authorization using JWT and bcrypt
Manage complex data relationships using MongoDB and Mongoose
Build robust RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express.js
Integrate Google Gemini API to add intelligent features like code/note explanation and README generation
Handle file uploads and storage securely and efficiently
Implement basic collaboration and visual contribution analytics
Deploy frontend, backend, and database to production cloud hosting platforms
